text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm... I have made my decision, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wish to run in this outfit in the upcoming
exhibition race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is scheduled to run in an
exhibition race next week, but as for her outfit...
choice_data_list: So you're going to wear that?
So you're going to wear that?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Since there are no particular regulations, I
wish to compete in traditional archery attire.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have chosen this as my signature racewear, as it
represents an ideal version of myself, rather than
my current self.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let's call it a garment of intent, fitting for one
whose accomplishments warrant a leadership
position. If I wear this, my appearance will match
my title as Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Though I remain some distance from the top—no, it fits because I seek to close that distance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As the outfit embodies the hunt, it lays bare our
true nature as Umamusume. This is why I wish to
run in archery attire.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I wish to kindle that fire deep inside me.
choice_data_list:
So what will you be hunting, Your Imperial
Majesty?

So what will you be hunting, Your Imperial
Majesty?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I wish to kindle that fire deep inside me.
choice_data_list:
So what will you be hunting, Your Imperial
Majesty?

So what will you be hunting, Your Imperial
Majesty?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A fine question. You see, one's limits are always
determined by one's rational self.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, when vying for first place, one's
instincts alone take hold, and such limitations are
abandoned.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Though such a change may appear too fierce and
uncivilized to reflect the ideal self I spoke of
earlier...

text_block_list.name: Ritual Coordinator
text_block_list.text:
We will now commence the archery ceremony!
Bows at the ready. Draw. Aaaand... release!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If one is to confront the Beast of yore, one must
be ready to go to war.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be worthy of my title if I allowed myself
to be overwhelmed and defenseless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm coming in. Huh, what's with the getup?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Rudolf. How about we have another go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel a chill down my spine at the sight of Narita
Brian staring down Symboli Rudolf like a predator
eyeing its prey...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My, my. I can see the wild hunger in your eyes.
Haven't you eaten?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...At any rate, be patient. Let us wait for a race
before we go for one other's throats.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've got a message for you from Air Groove. She
says preparations have been made for the
meeting tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Anyway, I've told you. Geez... I can't believe she woke me up for this...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see. Thank you for the heads-u—ah, she's gone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It appears my signature racewear has fired
us both up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Pick up your jaw off the floor! I'll ask you to
save that surprise for the race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Given the chance, I'll show you an even more
eye-opening performance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
One that will showcase the full extent of my might
as I fell the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Symboli Rudolf astonishes
everyone who sees her race in her archery attire.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It is but a matter of time before I reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There are a number of trials and tribulations I
must face on the way, and shooting them all down
may well prove nothing more than a lofty
ambition.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But even if I'm dismissed or ridiculed as being too
big for my cleats, my aim shall be true, and I shall
move ever upward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And should I succeed in drawing near that
summit...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I shall use these very legs to chase down whoever
stands there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I accompany Symboli Rudolf to the
track for a test run of her new racewear.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, that sounds like a good idea.
Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hi, Rudolf. Got some time?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: If so, you wanna race?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh... Ahahaha. Why not, C.B?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I shall meet you at the starting line. Or perhaps
you'd rather I escort you to the track?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Those eyes... You've sure got spark,
Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, how flattering to hear that from you. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the race begins...

text_block_list.name: Rudolf and C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Haaah!
Whooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both tear across the track. The tension in
the air feels nothing like the atmosphere you'd
expect at a practice run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intensity of their neck-and-neck race shakes
me to my very core.
